mapper.insert: INSERT INTO haosen_project..hr_org_relation (province, business_license_name, key_id, name, address, add_time, update_time) VALUES (#{province}, #{businessLicenseName}, #{keyId}, #{name}, #{address}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE haosen_project..hr_org_relation SET province = #{province}, business_license_name = #{businessLicenseName}, key_id = #{keyId}, name = #{name}, address = #{address}, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE business_license_name = #{businessLicenseName}

INSERT INTO haosen_project..hr_org_relation (business_license_name, province, key_id, name, address, add_time, update_time) SELECT t.business_license_name, t.standardized_province, t.key_id, t.name, t.address, GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM ( SELECT business_license_name, standardized_province, key_id, name, address, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY business_license_name ORDER BY create_time DESC) AS rn FROM haosen_project..hr_monitoring_data WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND business_license_name <> '' ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM haosen_project..hr_org_relation h WHERE h.business_license_name = t.business_license_name ) AND key_id <> '';
